name: penumbra-rhino-studio-gyroid
description: Penumbra Rhino Studio — standalone gyroid insert (no Grasshopper/Slop/CPig). Runs the plug-in command PenumbraGyroid, which pushes a native SDFTpms gyroid (clipped to a box) into the viewport and auto-fits the camera to it, then waits for a REAL converged frame and captures the conduit's active.png. The auto-fit makes the framing deterministic across runs, so this is the debug artifact for 'does the gyroid render + frame'. Requires the Penumbra Rhino plug-in registered for auto-load in this Rhino instance.

setup.vlmDescription: A gyroid TPMS lattice — a periodic minimal surface, a dense regular array of smooth interconnected holes/tunnels — clipped to a cube and shaded orange/tan, filling most of the viewport. NOT a plain solid sphere, NOT a plain solid cube, NOT an empty grey Rhino viewport.
